landing.main_headline: onslide Studio gives your team a centralized, admin-controlled slide library so everyone assembles on-brand presentations in minutes — without ever opening PowerPoint.
landing.pain_points_subtitle: Sound familiar? These are the problems onslide Studio was built to solve.
landing.offbrand_desc: Employees use outdated slides, wrong fonts, and inconsistent colors. Every presentation looks different.
landing.wasted_hours_desc: Assembling a presentation means digging through folders and copying between PowerPoint files. Every. Single. Time.
landing.version_confusion_title: Nobody knows which version is current
landing.version_confusion_desc: Multiple slide versions floating around in email threads, shared drives, and local folders.
landing.features_subtitle: A complete platform for presentation management — from slide library to export.
landing.feature_library_desc: One place for all approved slides. Admins manage the library — employees always use the latest, on-brand version.
landing.feature_board_desc: Drag and drop slides into your presentation on an intuitive Miro-style board. No PowerPoint required.
landing.feature_export_desc: Export your assembled presentation as a fully formatted PowerPoint or PDF — fonts, colors, and layouts intact.
landing.feature_ci_desc: Users can only edit the fields admins unlock. Design, fonts, and layouts are always on-brand.
landing.how_it_works_subtitle: Get your team presenting correctly in under a day.
landing.step1_desc: Upload approved slides, organize them into groups, and define which fields employees can customize.
landing.step2_desc: Drag slides onto the board, fill in customer-specific fields, and arrange the perfect presentation.
landing.step3_desc: Export as PowerPoint or PDF, or present directly from the browser. Every time, perfectly on-brand.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.starter_desc: Perfect for small teams and growing companies.
landing.team_desc: For teams that present every day.
landing.enterprise_desc: For large organizations with custom needs.
landing.ready_cta: Ready to end the slide chaos?
landing.final_cta: Join the teams that use onslide Studio to create on-brand presentations in minutes, not hours.
landing.social_proof: Trusted by 500+ marketing and sales teams
landing.testimonials_title: Teams that never go off-brand again
landing.testimonial1_quote: We cut our deck-prep time by 70%. Our sales team used to spend hours on this — now it's 15 minutes.
landing.testimonial2_quote: Finally, no more rogue PowerPoints. Every presentation looks like it came from our design team.
landing.testimonial3_quote: Our onboarding decks used to take a full day. Now our HR team does it in under 20 minutes.
landing.all_plans_trial: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.free_plan_available: Free plan available · Setup in under 5 minutes · Cancel anytime
landing.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about onslide Studio.
landing.faq_q1: How does onslide Studio differ from PowerPoint?
landing.faq_a1: onslide Studio doesn't replace PowerPoint — it replaces the chaos around it. Your admin uploads approved slides once, and your team assembles presentations from a centralized library. When you're done, you export a perfectly formatted .pptx file. No more copying between files, no more off-brand slides.
landing.faq_q2: Can I import my existing PowerPoint slides?
landing.faq_a2: Yes. During setup, your admin uploads .pptx files and onslide Studio automatically splits them into individual slides. Each slide becomes a reusable building block in your library — with thumbnails, tags, and version control.
landing.faq_q3: What happens during the free trial?
landing.faq_a3: You get full access to all features for 14 days — no credit card required. Upload slides, invite your team, create presentations, and export them. If you decide not to continue, your account simply becomes read-only.
landing.faq_a4: Absolutely. All data is stored in the EU on encrypted infrastructure. Each company is fully isolated (multi-tenancy with strict data separation). We follow OWASP security best practices and support GDPR compliance including a DPA template.
landing.faq_q5: Can multiple people work on the same presentation?
landing.faq_a5: Yes. You can share presentations with team members who can add slides, edit text fields, and leave comments. Each person can also attach private notes to slides. Version history lets you roll back to any previous state.
landing.faq_q6: Do I need to install any software?
landing.faq_a6: No. onslide Studio runs entirely in your browser — on desktop and mobile. There's nothing to install, no plugins, and no IT setup required. Just sign up and start building presentations.

legal.placeholder_notice: Note: Text marked in yellow contains placeholders that must be replaced with your company's actual information before going live.
legal.impressum_register_text: Registered at: [LOCAL COURT], Registration Number: [HRB NUMBER]
legal.impressum_vat_text: VAT ID according to § 27 a Umsatzsteuergesetz: [VAT ID]
legal.impressum_responsible: Responsible for content according to § 18 Abs. 2 MStV
legal.impressum_dispute_text: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration body.
legal.privacy_intro_text: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy informs you about how we collect, process, and use your personal data when you use our website and services. We process personal data in compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG).
legal.privacy_dpo_text:
You can reach our data protection officer at:
[DPO NAME]
[EMAIL]
legal.privacy_data_collected_text:
Account data: When you register, we collect your name, email address, company name, and password (stored as a hash). We also store your language preference and profile picture if provided.

Usage data: We collect information about how you use our service, including pages visited, features used, and timestamps of your activities.

Payment data: If you subscribe to a paid plan, we collect billing information including company name, address, and VAT ID. Payment processing is handled by our payment provider; we do not store credit card numbers.
legal.privacy_legal_basis_text:
We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:

• Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): Processing necessary for the performance of our service agreement with you.
• Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR): Processing necessary for our legitimate interests, such as improving our services and ensuring security.
• Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR): Where you have given consent, for example for analytics cookies.
• Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR): Processing necessary to comply with legal obligations, such as tax and accounting requirements.
legal.privacy_retention_text:
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected:

• Account data: For the duration of your account and 30 days after deletion.
• Usage data: 12 months.
• Payment and invoice data: 10 years (as required by German tax law).
• Server logs: 90 days.
legal.privacy_rights_text:
Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You may request information about what personal data we hold about you.
• Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You may request correction of inaccurate data.
• Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You may request deletion of your personal data.
• Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You may request that we restrict the processing of your data.
• Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You may request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
• Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): You may object to processing based on legitimate interests.
• Right to withdraw consent (Art. 7(3) GDPR): You may withdraw consent at any time.

To exercise these rights, please contact us at [EMAIL].
legal.privacy_third_parties_text:
We use the following third-party services:

• Supabase (Supabase Inc., USA): Hosting, database, and authentication. Data is processed under Standard Contractual Clauses.
• Vercel (Vercel Inc., USA): Website hosting and CDN. Data is processed under Standard Contractual Clauses.
• [PAYMENT PROVIDER]: Payment processing (when activated).
• [EMAIL SERVICE PROVIDER]: Transactional emails.
legal.privacy_cookies_text: Please refer to our Cookie Policy for detailed information about the cookies we use.
legal.privacy_changes_text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting a notice on our website.
legal.privacy_complaints_text:
You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. The competent supervisory authority is:

[STATE DATA PROTECTION AUTHORITY]
[ADDRESS]
[POSTAL CODE] [CITY]
legal.terms_scope_text:
onslide Studio ("the Service") is a browser-based presentation management platform provided by [COMPANY NAME] ("the Provider"). The Service allows authorized users within a business organization ("Tenant") to assemble, customize, and export presentations from a centralized slide library.

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern the use of the Service. By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to these Terms.
legal.terms_subscription_text:
The Service is offered under subscription plans as displayed on our website. Subscriptions are billed per user per month. The subscription fee is due at the beginning of each billing period.

A 14-day free trial is available for new accounts. No payment method is required during the trial period. After the trial ends, a paid subscription is required to continue using the Service.

All prices are net amounts and subject to applicable value-added tax (VAT).
legal.terms_cancellation_text:
Either party may cancel the subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, access continues until the end of the current billing period. After that, user data is retained for 30 days before being permanently deleted.

Cancellation can be requested through the Billing section in the admin dashboard.
legal.terms_obligations_text:
Users must:

• Provide accurate registration information.
• Keep their login credentials confidential.
• Not share their account with unauthorized persons.
• Use the Service only for lawful purposes.
• Not attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service.
legal.terms_prohibited_text:
The following uses are prohibited:

• Uploading content that infringes on third-party intellectual property rights.
• Using the Service to distribute malicious software.
• Attempting to gain unauthorized access to other users' data or accounts.
• Using automated scripts to access the Service without prior written consent.
• Circumventing access controls or security measures.
legal.terms_liability_text:
The Provider's liability is limited to intent and gross negligence. In cases of slight negligence, the Provider is only liable for breaches of essential contractual obligations (cardinal obligations), and such liability is limited to foreseeable, contract-typical damages.

The Provider is not liable for data loss to the extent the user has failed to maintain appropriate backups.

These limitations do not apply to liability for personal injury or under the Product Liability Act.
legal.terms_ip_text:
The Service, including its design, code, and documentation, is the intellectual property of the Provider. Users retain all rights to the content they upload.

By uploading content, users grant the Provider a limited, non-exclusive license to process and store the content for the purpose of providing the Service.
legal.terms_data_processing_text: The Provider processes personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy. For business customers processing personal data through the Service, a separate Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available.
legal.terms_governing_law_text:
These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG).

The exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from or in connection with these Terms is [CITY], Germany, provided the user is a merchant, legal entity under public law, or a special fund under public law.
legal.terms_changes_text: The Provider may amend these Terms at any time. Users will be notified of material changes at least 30 days in advance. Continued use of the Service after the changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
legal.cookie_intro_text: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the website operators.
legal.cookie_how_we_use_text: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our website, to improve your experience, and to understand how our website is used. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time using the Cookie Settings link in the footer.
legal.cookie_necessary_text:
These cookies are essential for the website to function. They enable basic functions such as page navigation, secure access to authenticated areas, and session management. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

Examples: session token, CSRF token, cookie consent preference.
Duration: Session or up to 1 year.
Legal basis: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
legal.cookie_functional_text:
These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalisation, such as remembering your language preference, display settings, and recently accessed presentations.

Examples: language preference, UI state.
Duration: Up to 1 year.
Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
legal.cookie_analytics_text:
These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve the website.

Examples: page views, feature usage, error tracking.
Duration: Up to 2 years.
Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
legal.cookie_marketing_text:
These cookies are used to deliver advertisements more relevant to you and your interests. They may also be used to limit the number of times you see an advertisement and to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

Examples: ad targeting, conversion tracking.
Duration: Up to 2 years.
Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
legal.cookie_manage_text:
You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of any page. You can also delete cookies through your browser settings.

Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the website.
legal.cookie_changes_text: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
legal.dpa_intro_text:
This Data Processing Agreement (Auftragsverarbeitungsvertrag — AVV) governs the processing of personal data by [COMPANY NAME] ("Processor") on behalf of the customer ("Controller") in connection with the use of the onslide Studio service.

This DPA is entered into pursuant to Article 28 GDPR.
legal.dpa_scope_text:
The Processor processes personal data on behalf of the Controller as part of providing the onslide Studio presentation management platform. The types of data processed include:

• User account data (name, email, profile information)
• Presentation content uploaded by users
• Usage and access logs
• Payment-related data (if applicable)

The categories of data subjects include employees and contractors of the Controller who are authorised to use the Service.
legal.dpa_toms_text:
The Processor implements and maintains the following measures to protect personal data:

• Encryption: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256).
• Access control: Role-based access control with multi-tenancy data isolation.
• Authentication: Secure password hashing, session management, and optional SSO.
• Backups: Daily automated backups with point-in-time recovery.
• Monitoring: Continuous system monitoring and alerting.
• Incident response: Documented incident response procedures with notification within 72 hours.
• Employee training: Regular data protection training for all staff.
legal.dpa_subprocessors_text:
The following sub-processors are used in the provision of the Service:

• Supabase Inc. (San Francisco, USA) — Database hosting, authentication, and storage. Standard Contractual Clauses in place.
• Vercel Inc. (San Francisco, USA) — Application hosting and CDN. Standard Contractual Clauses in place.
• [PAYMENT PROVIDER] — Payment processing (when activated).
• [EMAIL SERVICE PROVIDER] — Transactional email delivery.

The Controller will be notified in advance of any changes to sub-processors.
legal.dpa_download_desc: Download the full Data Processing Agreement as a Word document template with placeholder fields for your company details.
legal.cancellation_b2b_notice_text:
onslide Studio is a business-to-business (B2B) service. Our service is exclusively offered to businesses, entrepreneurs, and legal entities. As such, the statutory consumer right of withdrawal (Widerrufsrecht) pursuant to §§ 312g, 355 BGB does not apply to contracts concluded with us.

If you are a consumer who has mistakenly signed up, please contact us immediately at [EMAIL].
legal.cancellation_how_to_text:
You can cancel your subscription at any time through the Billing section in your admin dashboard. Upon cancellation:

• Your subscription remains active until the end of the current billing period.
• After the billing period ends, your account will be set to read-only.
• Your data will be retained for 30 days after the end of the billing period.
• After the 30-day retention period, all data will be permanently deleted.

To cancel, navigate to Admin → Billing → Cancel Subscription.
legal.cancellation_form_text:
If you prefer to cancel in writing, you may use the following template:

To: [COMPANY NAME], [ADDRESS], [POSTAL CODE] [CITY], [EMAIL]

I/We hereby give notice that I/we cancel the subscription contract for the provision of the onslide Studio service.

Ordered on / received on: _______________
Company name: _______________
Admin user name: _______________
Admin user email: _______________
Date: _______________
Signature (if sent by post): _______________
legal.cancellation_contact_text: For questions about cancellation, please contact us at [EMAIL].
